title: EscapeSurfaceProfile
description: Unified destructiveness ordinal enum (cardinality 7 per Luke S1002127 directive `=7`; PrivilegeEscalation inserted at ordinal 30 per D-S1002127-02 ADR). Defined once in workflow_core, consumed by m9 (namespace guard refuses Destructive|Catastrophic for stcortex writes), m30 (bank — stores per workflow), m32 (dispatch — banner_line() displayed before each step). escape-surface-checker agent verifies cross-site stability. Numeric ordinals use steps of 10 to reserve gaps for future inserts.

profile.description: Symbolic profile name (matches Rust enum variant). Order MATTERS — mirrors the ordinal hierarchy.

ordinal.description: Stable ordinal with numeric gap reservation (steps of 10) — DO NOT REORDER existing entries (would break serde + DB row diffs). New variants must be inserted into reserved gaps with explicit numeric value.

banner_line.description: Operator-facing banner displayed by m32 dispatcher before executing the step

ordinal_mapping.description: Canonical ordinal-to-symbolic-to-banner mapping (7-variant; D-S1002127-02). Drift between any site = CRITICAL.

m9_refuse_threshold.description: m9 namespace guard refuses any stcortex write where profile.ordinal >= this threshold (i.e. PrivilegeEscalation and higher require explicit Conductor-routed dispatch with HumanAcceptanceSignature.privilege_escalation_acknowledged=true).
